gate.name: fanout-baseline
gate.description: Compact baseline gate for balanced fan-out/fan-in throughput.

gate.name: fanout-payload-heavy
gate.description: Smaller payload-heavy gate to catch serialization and persistence regressions.

gate.name: timer-gated-fanout
gate.description: Single-timer gate to keep timer-path compatibility under coverage.

gate.name: update-gated-fanout
gate.description: Update-gated fan-out gate to catch workflow-task coordination regressions.

gate.name: child-workflow-gated-fanout
gate.description: Parent/child gate that keeps child-start and completion reflection under coverage.

smoke.name: fanout-baseline
smoke.description: Balanced fan-out/fan-in without retries or terminal cancellations.

smoke.name: fanout-retry
smoke.description: Fan-out with retryable first-attempt failures on 5% of activities.

smoke.name: fanout-cancel
smoke.description: Fan-out with terminal non-retryable cancellations on 5% of activities.

smoke.name: fanout-payload-heavy
smoke.description: Moderate fan-out with larger activity payloads to expose serialization overhead.

smoke.name: fanout-wide
smoke.description: Wider fan-out to stress the scheduling and completion path under higher concurrency.

smoke.name: timer-gated-fanout
smoke.description: One timer wakeup per workflow before the normal fan-out path.

smoke.name: signal-gated-fanout
smoke.description: One external signal per workflow gates fan-out execution.

smoke.name: update-gated-fanout
smoke.description: One workflow update per workflow gates fan-out execution and must complete before work starts.

smoke.name: continue-as-new-fanout
smoke.description: Each workflow rolls once with continue-as-new before executing the fan-out path.

smoke.name: child-workflow-gated-fanout
smoke.description: Each parent workflow starts and awaits one child workflow before fan-out execution.

target.name: fanout-baseline
target.description: Balanced fan-out/fan-in without retries or terminal cancellations.

target.description: Moderate fan-out with larger activity payloads to expose serialization overhead.

target.description: One timer wakeup per workflow before the normal fan-out path.

target.name: signal-gated-fanout
target.description: One external signal per workflow gates fan-out execution.

target.name: update-gated-fanout
target.description: One workflow update per workflow gates fan-out execution and must complete before work starts.

target.name: continue-as-new-fanout
target.description: Each workflow rolls once with continue-as-new before executing the fan-out path.

target.name: child-workflow-gated-fanout
target.description: Each parent workflow starts and awaits one child workflow before fan-out execution.
